name: ImDiffusion
paper: ImDiffusion: Imputed Diffusion Models for Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection
description: ImDiffusion combines time series imputation and diffusion models to achieve accurate and robust anomaly detection. The imputation-based approach employed by ImDiffusion leverages the information from neighboring values in the time series, enabling precise modeling of temporal and inter-correlated dependencies, reducing uncertainty in the data, thereby enhancing the robustness of the anomaly detection process. ImDiffusion further leverages diffusion models as time series imputers to accurately capture complex dependencies.
